series_metadata.series_description: Groundwater investigation files, records on surface casing programs, technical data, policy documents, and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years following close of investigation, unless paper copies are scanned and saved into an electronic format. After paper records are scanned into an electronic format, they may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years following close of investigation, then delete., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
